text:
Waiver Type Code (8th Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the 8th of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of the 
12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_08_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_08_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_08_11
